summary: Privacy Compliance Reports feature testing complete. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified working - schedule card, compliance reports card, dropdowns, toggles, and Send Report Now button all functional with proper backend integration.

tests: Super admin gets schedule with all fields
Returns 403 for tenant admins (super admin only)
Day of week is case-insensitive (MONDAY -> monday)
Returns 403 for tenant admins (super admin only)
Response includes report_id, coverage_percent, flagged_count, recipients_count, emails_sent, email_results, generated_at
Returns reports array with report_data containing coverage_percent and flagged_items

components_verified: schedule-enabled-toggle - Working, toggles weekly reports on/off
schedule-day-select - Working, updates backend when changed
schedule-hour-select - Working, updates backend when changed
schedule-recipients-select - Working, shows Super Admins only / All Admins options
Report history displays with coverage badges (100% shown in green)
Triggered by attribution shows (scheduler or admin email)
Empty state handled ('No compliance reports sent yet')

verified: Schedule updated toast on successful update

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All compliance endpoints correctly require admin role

✓ Send report endpoint correctly restricted to super_admin only
✓ Validation working for day_of_week, hour_utc, and recipients
✓ Background scheduler starts on server startup (startup_privacy_scheduler)
✓ Email sending via SendGrid working (real emails sent)
✓ Report data includes coverage_percent, flagged_items, emails_sent
✓ All data-testid attributes present for testing
✓ UI correctly updates backend when dropdowns/toggles changed
seed_data_creation: Multiple compliance reports created during testing (visible in UI with 100% coverage)
